specific_question: By April 1, 2026, how many redundant software licenses will the asset management team have identified and consolidated under Elexion Automotive's digital asset registry?
answer: According to Elexion Automotive's 2025 IT governance forecast, Olivia's team is projected to consolidate 312 redundant software licenses to reduce operating costs and streamline digital asset management.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
